title: Copy of Claude Cowork Plugins - Free Resource Guide
text_content:
Claude Cowork Plugins - Free Resource Guide


Open-Source Plugins (GitHub)
Anthropic Knowledge Work Plugins
11 ready-to-use plugins for HR, finance, legal, sales, marketing, design, and operations. All open source. Just text files, no code required.

Plugin Library and Setup
Claude Plugins Page
Browse the full plugin library. Install plugins directly from here into your Cowork sidebar.

Plugin Help Center
Step-by-step guide to installing, customizing, and creating your own plugins.

Official Blog Post
Full announcement with examples of what each plugin can do.

Available Plugin Categories
Productivity - Task management, workplace memory, visual dashboard
Data Analysis - SQL queries, data exploration, visualization, dashboards
Operations - Vendor management, process docs, capacity planning
Legal - Contract review, NDA triage, compliance workflows
Sales - Prospect research, deal prep, sales process
Finance - Financial modeling, competitor analysis, key metrics
HR - Job descriptions, onboarding materials, offer letters
Design - UX copy, accessibility audits, design critiques
Engineering - Code review, documentation, technical specs
Investment Banking - Transaction docs, comparable companies, pitch materials
Equity Research - Earnings transcripts, financial models, research notes

Enterprise Connectors
Plugins can connect Claude to your existing tools:
Google Drive, Gmail, Google Calendar, DocuSign, FactSet, Apollo, Clay, Outreach, SimilarWeb, MSCI, LegalZoom, WordPress, Harvey

How to Get Started
1. Open Claude Desktop app
2. Switch to the Cowork tab
3. Click Customize in the left sidebar
4. Browse and install plugins
5. Or use Plugin Create to build your own

Note: Plugins require a Pro plan ($20/month) or higher. The plugins themselves are free and open source.

Pro Tips
Start with the Productivity plugin. It gives you task management and a visual dashboard right away.

Customize any plugin by editing the markdown files. Add your company terminology, your tools, your processes.

Use Plugin Create (built into Cowork) to make a plugin from scratch. No coding needed.


Compiled by @aifornontechies
Last updated: February 26, 2026
